text: RED Engineer, the only know being to posses the magical Ellispencer, renowned for it's wish granting properties, is visited one day by RED Heavy. Heavy, butthurt about being constantly trolled by Spies, comes to that conclusion that he sucks due to inferior weapons and decides to ask Engineer for a wish from the Ellispencer. Engineer approves, and Heavy is promptly eaten by the Ellispencer for evaluation and is the spit back out with a brand new firearm. However, it is quickly stolen by BLU spy.

text: Here we see the Heavy in its natural habitat fleeing from what might possibly be itself, in fear it inquires if it can obtain a defensive object to protect itself from said shadow. The Engie replies positively and opens the Ellispenser which consumes the Heavy. With new weapon in hand, the Heavy caresses it to signify it it his weapon. Upon smelling this weapon, a Spy approaches and uses a clever disguise to obtain Heavies new weapon. In disgust, Female scout and Engie become Zoey and Francis.
author: @V45844
